name: Cream Puff Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 packages instant vanilla pudding mix (3 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in the water.
2. Gradually add the flour and cook, stirring constantly, until it forms a ball.
3. Turn into a bowl and beat in the eggs one at a time, beating well between each addition.
4. Spread flat on a 9-inch x 13-inch greased baking pan.
5. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-40 minutes.
6. Allow to cool completely.
7. Mix together the cream cheese and milk until smooth.
8. Gradually add one package of instant pudding mix, stirring after each addition.
9. Spread over the cooled shell.
10. Top with whipped cream and drizzle chocolate syrup on top.
11. Chill for at least one hour before serving.
